__comment_spec: Spec 071 SCOPE-04 — Assistant Intents dashboard inventory per design.md §'Assistant Intents Dashboard'. Seven panels render the closed-vocabulary metrics declared in internal/assistant/intenttrace/export.go (smackerel_assistant_intent_traces_total{transport,sampled,action_class,final_response_status}) joined with the spec 064 refusal counter (openknowledge_refusal_total{cause}). Cardinality is bound on every series. Importable into an existing Grafana instance via the Grafana HTTP API (POST /api/dashboards/db) or via Grafana's filesystem provider. Not wired into deploy/compose.deploy.yml in this repo because Grafana is not a project-owned runtime; the deploy adapter overlay binds it. Spec 071 SCN-071-A06 and SCN-071-A07 validate this JSON via tests/integration/monitoring/assistant_intents_dashboard_test.go.
title: Smackerel — Assistant Intents (spec 071)

panels.title: Total turns (full + sampled-out)
panels.description: spec 071 design §'Assistant Intents Dashboard' panel 'Total turns'. Sum of persisted full traces and sampled-out envelopes — sampling MUST NOT under-count turns. A flat line at zero while the assistant is in use means the recorder fan-out is broken; the panel name calls out the recorder as the source rather than rendering zeroes as success.

panels.title: Top action classes
panels.description: spec 071 design §'Assistant Intents Dashboard' panel 'Top action classes'. Topk distribution of action_class across the selected window. Sudden drop in known classes hints at compiler regression; sudden new class hints at vocabulary drift.

panels.title: Clarification rate
panels.description: spec 071 design §'Assistant Intents Dashboard' panel 'Clarification rate'. Rate of full traces whose final_response_status = 'clarify'. Sustained climb indicates compiler ambiguity that the user keeps re-answering — a P2 (Vague In, Precise Out) regression signal.

panels.title: Refusal causes (join with openknowledge counter)
panels.description: spec 071 design §'Assistant Intents Dashboard' panel 'Refusal causes'. SCN-071-A07 join: the IntentTrace refusal_cause vocabulary is the same closed set as openknowledge_refusal_total{cause}. Two series side by side surface a join mismatch immediately — drift between the two would split the line into mutually-exclusive non-zero subsets.

panels.title: Compiler errors
panels.description: spec 071 design §'Assistant Intents Dashboard' panel 'Compiler errors'. Rate of spec 068 compiler failure causes (cause label is a closed vocabulary). A new cause spike usually correlates with a clarify rate spike (panel 3).

panels.title: Capture-as-fallback rate
panels.description: spec 071 design §'Assistant Intents Dashboard' panel 'Capture-as-fallback rate'. Rate of full traces whose final_response_status = 'capture_fallback'. Used by spec 074 to verify the inviolable Capture-as-Fallback policy is exercised on every refused/unavailable turn.

panels.title: Recent trace samples (retention sweep)
panels.description: spec 071 design §'Assistant Intents Dashboard' panel 'Recent trace samples'. Rate of rows deleted by the IntentTrace retention sweep. SCN-071-A09 invariant. A sudden zero while traces keep being emitted (panel 1) means the sweep is wedged and the retention TTL is not being enforced.
